I agree with option D because hypoglycemia is a life-threatening condition in diabetics post-trauma—especially those on glimepiride—and unconsciousness could stem from it rather than intracranial pathology. The priority is immediate evaluation of blood glucose before proceeding to imaging; delaying this may worsen outcomes.
